title: Cobble Quest
description: Official modpack for Cobble Quest server
body:
Welcome to Cobble Quest!
Embark on an epic journey where the world of Minecraft meets the captivating universe of Cobblemon. Cobble Quest is a curated modpack designed specifically for our community server, focusing on exploration, collection, and progression.
Key Features:
Catch 'em All: Encounter hundreds of Pokémon in their natural habitats across diverse biomes.
Quest-Driven Adventure: Complete custom challenges and tasks to earn unique rewards and progress through the world.
Immersive World: Explore enhanced structures, dungeons, and beautiful landscapes powered by top-tier world generation mods.
Optimized Performance: Enjoy a smooth gameplay experience with a suite of performance and quality-of-life (QoL) mods.
Server-Ready: Perfectly configured to play with friends on our official server. Join our community and become the ultimate trainer!
Whether you are building a massive PokéCenter or hunting for elusive Shinies, Cobble Quest offers the perfect balance of survival and monster-collection.
